MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Richard Hurlburt, Esq. 642-7300 for pltf & opposing party; Lin Duiven, Esq. 467-8200 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment granted no triable issue of fact re subtenant's right to remain in premises. 6.14 notice issued. Grant as to rent ordinance, negligence, 17200.
Argued and the Court denied the motion for summary judgment. Pltf to prepare order.
